heroDescription: Meet the leadership behind Bitumpro’s advanced bitumen technology, operational strategy, and long-term infrastructure vision.
executiveTeamDescription: Bitumpro is led by founders with extensive experience in bitumen production, petroleum product development, international supply, and business growth. The leadership team combines technical knowledge, operational experience, and a clear vision for introducing advanced Nano PMB technology to the Canadian infrastructure market.
ceoDescription: Vahid Sheikhi, CEO and majority shareholder of Bitumpro Products Inc., brings more than 25 years of leadership experience in bitumen refining, petroleum product development, plant operations, nanomaterials research, and international business. His background includes leading the development of more than 150 petroleum products and exporting to more than 33 countries.
achievement1Description: Extensive leadership experience in bitumen production, petroleum refining, product innovation, plant operations, and international supply.
achievement2Description: Led the development of a broad portfolio of petroleum and bitumen-based products, combining technical expertise with market-driven product innovation.
achievement3Description: Experience supplying petroleum and bitumen products to more than 33 countries across international infrastructure and industrial markets.
leadershipValuesDescription: Our leadership is guided by technical discipline, responsible growth, innovation, operational reliability, and long-term value creation.
globalVisionDescription: Building Bitumpro as a Canadian company with international perspective, global market understanding, and scalable infrastructure material solutions.
industryExpertiseDescription: Deep experience in bitumen refining, polymer-modified binders, petroleum product development, nanomaterials research, plant operations, and infrastructure supply chains.
ethicalLeadershipDescription: Committed to transparency, accountability, responsible business practices, and long-term partnerships with customers, suppliers, and stakeholders.
innovationDescription: Driving the development of Nano Polymer Modified Bitumen and future nano-based infrastructure materials designed to improve pavement durability and lifecycle performance.
wealthCreationDescription: Creating long-term value through technical knowledge, operational experience, product development, and the transformation of petroleum-based materials into higher-performance infrastructure solutions.
joinOurVisionDescription: Partner with Bitumpro’s leadership team to support advanced infrastructure materials, reliable supply, and long-term value creation.
